title: CI Gate Policy
description: Schema for SDLC quality gates enforced during CI. Gates define required checks, approval workflows, and risk controls before code is merged or released. See .docs/sdlc/gates.md for policy details.

phase.description: SDLC phase during which this gate applies.

description.description: Purpose and rationale for the gate.

requiredChecks.description: List of required CI checks (e.g., 'npm test', 'agentquilt check').

requiredApprovals.description: Number of required human approvals before proceeding.

condition.description: Condition that triggers this risk (e.g., 'changes to compiler core').

level.description: Risk level if condition is met.

riskCriteria.description: Risk assessments that must be documented if triggered.

escalationPath.description: Team or individuals to notify if gate blocks a PR (e.g., ['@maintainers']).

enabled.description: Whether this gate is currently active.

examples.name: intake-gate
examples.description: Validates that new issues meet basic quality criteria.

examples.name: pr-quality-gate
examples.description: Ensures all PRs pass CI and code review before merge.

notes: Gates are applied in SDLC phase order during development.
Risk criteria drive the need for additional reviews or documentation.
See policies/gates/ for concrete policy definitions.
